body: அப்படி இல்ல · "not like that" — six days out, still yours. tap in whenever 🎧
சமையலறை · "the kitchen" — new scene's ready when you are 🍳
நல்லா பண்ணோம் · "we did good today" 🌙 — catch: புரியுது

rationale: 6 days since last session — cold-start risk; lowest-friction reply-in-tamizh ask seeds the new kitchen scene and puts one fireable phrase in his mouth before he's thought about it.
body: kitchen-la yaaro samaikkira — *என்ன சமைக்கிற?* (what are you cooking?) — reply in tamizh. that's the whole ask 🍳

rationale: No session in 7 days — cold-start risk is real; kitchen scene is already seeded and low-stakes, so a single reply-in-tamizh text ask is the lowest-friction re-opener without pressuring or pitching.
body: சமையலறை-ல யாரோ cooking பண்றாங்க. Andrew walks in — what does he say? (enna samaikkira 👀)
